fields_changed.what: AI search + chat + agents on Teamwork Graph; at Team '26 (May 2026) Atlassian opened the Teamwork Graph (150B+ connections) as a cross-tool context layer spanning Atlassian + third-party tools and evolved Rovo from helper into agentic execution (plan + run multistep work autonomously); 5M+ MAU; bundled into paid Atlassian Cloud plans
fields_changed.notes: also acquired Secoda (Dec 2025); Team '26 = clearest incumbent move toward open-loop, autonomous cross-tool action

change_summary: Team '26 (May 2026): opened Teamwork Graph (150B+ connections) + Rovo agentic execution; 5M MAU

fields_changed.notes: Canonical OpenAI Workspace Agents announcement confirmed (was secondary-blog); always-on agents across Slack, Salesforce, M365, Drive, GitHub, Notion + 60+ apps; free through Jul 6 2026, then credit-based pricing

change_summary: Confirmed canonical Workspace Agents announcement; free until Jul 6 2026 then credit-priced
